chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.S-299 of 2022 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of main case. 08.08.2024. Mr. Nadir Khan Burdi, advocate for respondent No. 1. Learned counsel for respondent No. 1 has pointed out that on the last date of hearing viz. 10.05.2024, after hearing the parties, the impugned order was set aside and this petition was allowed, however, learned Judge did not mention the word “disposed of” and instead ordered the roster to fix this case after summer vacation. Learned counsel submits that this petition having served its purpose and has become infructuous as after setting aside the impugned order, the case before the trial Court has been revived. In view of above, this petition is disposed of in terms of order dated 10.05.2024. JUDGE HANIF
